purpose: Record France Galop / LeTROT / FNCH route recheck for PR-130. This file is not a calendar input.

source_rechecks.result: France Galop navigation exposes Yesterday, Today, Tomorrow, Other dates, Pattern & Listed races, Group 1 races, and a calendar subscription page. Other dates redirects to sign-in in the captured path, and no complete 2026-06 meeting_date + racecourse month table was captured.

France Galop calendar subscription page confirms a free calendar-subscription route with choices for all France, federation, and racecourse, but captured text does not expose downloadable ICS/API rows or complete June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse values.

FNCH official calendar route exposes current-day rows with date, hippodrome, discipline, federation, and audience. Captured rows for 2026-06-02 include Saint-Cloud (Plat / France Galop), Hyeres (Trot), Les Sables d'Olonne (Trot), and Paris-Vincennes (Trot). The captured route did not expose a complete 2026-06 month table, so no manual promotion.

LeTROT GNT route is accessible but captured text exposes title/navigation only. Secondary snippets identify GNT 2026 stages such as Laval on 2026-06-03 and Agen on 2026-06-17, but this is not a complete official LeTROT June calendar and is not promoted.

promotion_status.reason: No captured official source currently provides a complete June 2026 France Galop or LeTROT meeting_date + racecourse month table. Partial day rows and GNT snippets are insufficient.

next_steps: Find the underlying FNCH or Equidia calendar API/parameter used for the monthly filter.
Find France Galop calendar subscription ICS/API output if accessible without login.
Find LeTROT calendar-resultats date/month API or export with full June 2026 racecourse rows.
